name: Lewis Black
bio: Lewis Black is an American stand-up comedian and actor whose routines often escalate into furious, finger-jabbing rants about politics, religion, and cultural absurdity. He has delivered his Back in Black commentary on The Daily Show since 1996 and won the 2007 Grammy for Best Comedy Album. Trained as a playwright with an MFA from Yale, he turned to comedy full time in the late 1980s.

timeline.ev: Earns MFA from Yale School of Drama
Begins Back in Black segment on The Daily Show
HBO special Black on Broadway airs
Wins Grammy for Best Comedy Album for The Carnegie Hall Performance
Voices Anger in Pixars Inside Out

accolades: Voted 51st of Comedy Centrals 100 greatest stand-ups (2004)
Back in Black on The Daily Show since 1996

bits.t: How Long Does It Take You People to Shop?
